_README: This file maps credential_ref values (set in cm_sftp_endpoints.credential_ref
in the PracticeOS database) to actual SFTP credentials.
Copy this file to config.json and fill in real credentials.
On the droplet, restrict permissions: chmod 600 config.json
Each credential_ref entry supports either password OR privateKey auth.
If both are provided, privateKey takes precedence.
Keys can be PEM-encoded RSA, ed25519, or ECDSA. Paste the literal key contents
as a JSON-escaped multiline string OR provide privateKeyPath pointing to a file.
pilot_trib_inbound      - Trillium inbound for pilot practice
pilot_trib_outbound     - Trillium outbound for pilot practice
pilot_trib_bidirectional - both directions on one credential
pilot_ncdhhs_inbound    - NC DHHS state file drops

EXAMPLE_with_inline_key.privateKey:
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
b3BlbnNzaC1rZXktdjEAAAAABG5vbmUAAAA...
-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----
